name: Do I need a lawyer for my simple wrist sprain from work in Saint George?
description: Maybe not for simple, but yes if denied.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my simple wrist sprain from work in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe not for simple, but yes if denied.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Not always for simple cases, but recommended if denied or complex.** Utah Division offers info, not representation.[1] Key factors: Insurers minimize payouts; lawyers boost settlements. Free consults common, no win no fee. For disputes, expertise maximizes benefits.
